title: Identical nodes in connections tree
author: Googleboom
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
I have several servers that are shared between tree branches (projects). Nodes have the same server name/IP and same user name+domain. 
When I have a RDP connection already opened in one branch and click on the identical node in another branch, I am asked to enter credentials and the connection is re-opened. 

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a...

iterations.description: Bulk verified: commit fe43053f exists (HIGH confidence)

comments.author: BlueBlock
comments.snippet: That would make sense to just go to the open tab but only if the username is different.

comments.author: Googleboom
comments.snippet:
> That would make sense to just go to the open tab but only if the username is different.

No, especially if the user is the same. A reconnection is mandatory anyway if users are different.
Just as an example of the case:
10 projects/branches. Each contains a Live server and a SharedResource server.
The SharedResource server has a single isntance and is shared for all (or only part) projects.

I work with Project1 and have the SharedResource server connected.
Then I need to open the Shar...

comments.author: BlueBlock
comments.snippet:
I think we agree. Correct me if I'm wrong.

I incorrectly explained what I was trying to say:
That would make sense to just go to the open tab but only if the username is -the same-.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `fe43053f` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Identical nodes in connections tree

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

notes:
AI triage (claude): Enhancement to navigate to existing open tab when connecting to a node that already has an active connection with the same username, improving UX for multi-project workflows.
Approach: Before opening a new connection, check if an identical node (same host+username) already has an active/open tab; if so, focus that tab instead of creating a duplicate connection.
